verdict: Phase 9 contradiction metric was corrupted by the dataset bug fixed in #00a-1 (commit-equivalent: edit at semantic_memory_dataset.py:457 + :559). Pre-fix logic counted any fact with len(history)>1 as a contradiction; this conflated random fact-key reuse in substantive_specs with explicit revisions. Pool: 35 (pre-fix) → 5 (post-fix); spurious rate ~96.7% → 0%. With the fix, ensemble contradiction top-1 collapses from claimed 0.30 (seed-1337 single) to 0.0 ± 0.0 across 5 seeds, and ensemble UNDERPERFORMS keyword baseline on contradiction. The Phase 9 verdict's '+27pp ensemble vs keyword on contradiction' was an artifact of the bug; the real signal is that Phase 9's HDC ensemble does NOT solve contradiction-resolution without further architectural work (P3 fact-graph + P4 incremental write are the candidate fixes).
notes: M-PROJECTX-012 corrective verdict: prior contradiction metric was largely artifact-of-bug.
Single-seed (1337) pre-fix Phase 9: ensemble contradiction top1=0.30, keyword top1=0.0333, +27pp.
Multi-seed (5) post-fix Phase 10 P1: ensemble contradiction top1=0.0±0.0, keyword top1≈0.13, ensemble UNDERPERFORMS.
Fix: semantic_memory_dataset.py:457 build_queries() + :559 metric — supersedes_turn_id walk.
